title: Bad Iceberg function validation
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = 't0/') PARTITION BY (icebergTruncate(c0));
/*optional value assertion*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = 't0/') PARTITION BY (icebergTruncate(c0));
key_bug_features: Partitioning by icebergTruncate function in IcebergLocal engine
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 Int, c2 String) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = 't1/') PARTITION BY (icebergTruncate(c1));
CREATE TABLE t2 (c3 Float64, c4 Date) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = 't2/') PARTITION BY (icebergTruncate(c3));
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON icebergTruncate(t1.c1) = icebergTruncate(t2.c3);
